meta.description: OpenAI-compatible gateway to models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and more. Balance in rubles, pay per token, no foreign bank cards.

hero.subline: An OpenAI-compatible API to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and other models. Balance in rubles, pay per token, no foreign bank cards.

how.title: From top-up to first response in three steps
how.s1b: SBP, crypto or Lolzteam Market. Rubles to your balance, no foreign bank cards.
how.s2b: One sk-uzel-... key in the dashboard. Works with the official OpenAI SDK.
how.s3b: Point to our base URL and a model. We charge your balance by actual token usage.

live.title: Works with your current SDK
live.subtitle: One key and balance, two formats to choose from. Change only the base URL — streaming passes through untouched.
live.response: Hi! Replying through Uzel, a single gateway to the models. The same key and balance work with both the OpenAI SDK and the Anthropic SDK.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing. Pay for tokens.
pricing.subtitle: Prices in rubles per 1M tokens. Charged by actual usage, no subscriptions or minimums.

bento.title: Everything you need on one balance
bento.balanceBody: Top up once, spend on any model in the catalog. No separate accounts per provider.
bento.streamBody: SSE passes through untouched, token by token, like the provider.
bento.supportBody: Live answers and alerts. Dashboard tickets mirror to chat.

comparison.title: Directly with providers or through Uzel
direct: Foreign bank cards and a VPN to pay
A separate key and invoice per provider
Prices in dollars, tied to the exchange rate
Invoices in English, no closing documents
uzel: SBP, crypto and Lolzteam in rubles
One key for every model in the catalog
Fixed prices in rubles per 1M tokens
Clear receipts and history in the dashboard
A key in a minute, no waiting

items.q: Is it compatible with the OpenAI SDK?
items.a: Yes. Point to our base URL and key, the rest of your code stays the same. The /v1/chat/completions endpoint works in streaming and non-streaming modes.

items.q: How do I top up via SBP, crypto or Lolz?
items.a: SBP, crypto and Lolzteam Market are supported. Credited in rubles; the fee and rate are shown before payment, and the balance updates after confirmation.

items.q: How are tokens and cost calculated?
items.a: By actual usage: (input tokens x input price + output x output price) / 1,000,000. Prices are fixed in rubles and shown in the model catalog.
Models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Qwen, Mistral and more. The full list with prices and context is in the dashboard.
60 requests per minute per key by default, configurable. Up to 5 concurrent requests per account.

items.q: Do I need foreign bank cards?
items.a: No. All payment methods are local and in rubles; no VPN or foreign cards required.

cta.headline: Connect to the best LLMs in a minute
cta.subline: Create a key, top up your balance and send your first request. No foreign bank cards, no subscriptions.
cta.telegram: Or ask a question on Telegram

footer.tagline: An OpenAI-compatible gateway to leading language models. Balance in rubles, pay per token.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Uzel is an OpenAI-compatible gateway. If you already have OpenAI SDK code, just change the base URL and key.
docs.quickstartBody: Create a key in the dashboard and pass it in the Authorization: Bearer header.
docs.modelsBody: The endpoint returns available models in OpenAI format.
docs.streamBody: Add "stream": true — the response arrives as server-sent events, passed through untouched.
docs.anthropicBody: The official @anthropic-ai/sdk works via the /v1/messages endpoint with x-api-key and anthropic-version headers.
docs.errorsBody: Errors are returned in OpenAI format. Main codes:
docs.err429: rate limit exceeded, retry after Retry-After.

auth.errorExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.keyCreated: Key created. Save it now — it won't be shown again.
dashboard.emptyKeys: Create your first key to get started
dashboard.subject: Subject
